overall.description: A first-person walk through a foggy cyberpunk city at night. The player moves along wet streets past neon-lit hotels and stadiums, with palm trees lining the sidewalks. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with heavy fog and artificial lighting characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

tall palm trees lining the sidewalk edge
white concrete barrier along the walkway edge
large vertical billboard with figure advertisement

segments.scene_description: Walking along a foggy sidewalk beside a hotel building with neon signage. Two pedestrians walk ahead on the wet concrete path lined with palm trees and white railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with Los Osos stadium district

events.description: turns left at corner, leaving hotel sidewalk for open street intersection

large curved building with digital advertising screens
wide road crossing with traffic markings

segments.scene_description: Turning left at the corner into a wider street intersection. The cyan 'LOS OSOS' neon sign dominates the left side while a large stadium structure with digital screens becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street under overpass with stadium adjacent

curved array of bright advertising displays wrapping the stadium

segments.scene_description: Passing beneath an overpass alongside the stadium. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed, with artificial street lighting illuminating the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy street intersection with traffic signals

events.description: street light creates prominent lens flare with rainbow effect

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, moving toward the crosswalk

bright street lamp creating rainbow lens flare effect

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered underpass and approaching a foggy intersection. Traffic lights glow in the distance while a street lamp creates a prominent rainbow lens flare effect.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit urban corridor that shifts from a narrow sidewalk into a vast, atmospheric intersection. It begins by moving along a foggy concrete path beside a hotel with neon signage, following two pedestrians past palm trees and white railings. As the camera turns left at the corner, the view opens into a wider street dominated by a cyan LOS OSOS sign and the looming presence of a stadium with digital screens. The scene then transitions into a darker, more enclosed environment while passing beneath an overpass, where artificial lights reflect off the wet asphalt. Finally, the camera exits the covered underpass to approach a foggy intersection, where distant traffic lights glow and a street lamp creates a prominent rainbow lens flare.
